summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of SheStylish luxury abaya landing page. All 15 test scenarios passed including loader, navigation, hero, marquee, collections, how-it-works, testimonials, booking, GCC flags, Instagram grid, footer, floating button, and mobile responsiveness.

issues: Hero heading text 'Editorial elegance, draped in noir.' renders across multiple HTML elements (split into styled spans), so string match on full text fails — but visually it is correct and all words are present

context_for_next_testing_agent: All sections tested: loader (~2.6s), sticky nav, hero WhatsApp CTA, gold marquee (6 GCC countries), 4 collection cards with correct wa.me hrefs, how-it-works 4 steps, 4 testimonials with GCC locations, booking section with wa.me + tel links, 6 GCC flag tiles, 9 Instagram tiles, footer, floating WhatsApp button. Mobile drawer menu also working. All data-testids present and correct.
